issues.title: Change method name of getContent to getText in interface Content
issues.body: Deprecate `getContent` and add `getText` as it is clearer that it related to textual output as compared to the word content that is broader in nature.

comments.body: Sorry, yes ,the idea is to deprecate first, which as been done for M5, and now in M6 we will remove the deprecation.  Going to close this issue as done as there will be another issue to remove all deprecated methods.  Thanks for the comment.
